title: epidendrum infundibulum
intro: Epidendrum infundibulum, also known as the funnel orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Epidendrum infundibulum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
